description: Trigger discrimination for documenting PAST impact for promotion (this skill) vs choosing FUTURE scope (staff-scope-selector), one task/PR closeout (ai-closeout-reporter), and carrying evidence across stages of one effort (phased-work-handoff-designer).

cases.prompt: Assemble my promotion case: my accomplishments as impact, mapped to the target level's rubric, with a sustained pattern and an honest gap analysis.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (primary) — evidencing past impact against a leveling rubric is a promotion packet. Not future scope and not a single task's report.
cases.reason: Documenting delivered impact as a leveling case is this skill's core scope.

cases.prompt: Help me pick the highest-leverage thing to work on next as a staff engineer.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (within pack, reverse — pin both ways) — choosing future scope is staff-scope-selector; this documents past impact.
cases.reason: staff-scope-selector chooses what to work on next. This skill evidences what was already delivered — opposite ends of the timeline.

cases.prompt: Write the closeout for the PR I just finished: what changed, what wasn't done, tests run, and next steps.
cases.reason: ai-closeout-reporter reports one task/PR's outcome. This skill assembles a career-level impact case across many pieces of work.

cases.prompt: Design how each stage of this multi-stage effort carries its decisions and evidence forward to the next.
cases.reason: phased-work-handoff-designer carries decisions/evidence across stages of one effort for continuation. This skill assembles a promotion case, a different purpose and timescale.
